project_change.description: Adding a coating booth and storing a new hazardous liquid at a Southern California manufacturing facility.

missing_facts.why_needed: Hazardous waste generator category depends on monthly generation quantity.
Wastewater pretreatment applicability depends on whether process wastewater is discharged.

coverage_family_statuses.reason: Project adds equipment that may emit air contaminants.
Industrial activity codes or construction acreage require stormwater review.
Project identifies waste streams that need generator-status review.
Stored chemicals may include a highly hazardous chemical at or above an OSHA PSM threshold quantity.

regulatory_angles.label: New or modified emitting equipment
regulatory_angles.reason: Coating or process equipment may require air district authorization.

regulatory_angles.label: Air exemption or registration path
regulatory_angles.reason: SCAQMD rules may route some equipment to exemption or registration instead of a permit.

regulatory_angles.label: Federal Clean Air Act operating permit
regulatory_angles.reason: A facility whose potential-to-emit reaches major-source levels may need a federal Title V operating permit on top of the district permit.

regulatory_angles.label: Industrial stormwater coverage
regulatory_angles.reason: SIC/NAICS may trigger California Industrial General Permit coverage.

regulatory_angles.label: Construction stormwater coverage
regulatory_angles.reason: Construction activity disturbing one or more acres may require permit coverage.

regulatory_angles.label: Hazardous material business plan threshold
regulatory_angles.reason: Hazardous material quantities must be compared to reporting thresholds.

regulatory_angles.label: EPCRA community right-to-know reporting
regulatory_angles.reason: Federal EPCRA Tier II / §311-312 reporting may apply when hazardous chemicals exceed reporting thresholds, independent of the state HMBP.

regulatory_angles.label: Hazardous waste generator status
regulatory_angles.reason: Spent solvent or process waste may affect generator category.

regulatory_angles.label: Industrial wastewater pretreatment
regulatory_angles.reason: Industrial process wastewater discharges may trigger pretreatment review.

regulatory_angles.label: OSHA Process Safety Management
regulatory_angles.reason: Storing a listed highly hazardous chemical at or above its threshold quantity triggers the OSHA PSM standard (29 CFR 1910.119).

research_graph.question: Does the new equipment require an SCAQMD Permit to Construct?
research_graph.claim_to_test: SCAQMD Permit to Construct may apply before installing emitting equipment.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

research_graph.question: Do solvent VOC emissions require additional review?
research_graph.claim_to_test: Solvent use may create VOC-related review needs.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

research_graph.question: Is Rule 219 exemption available?
research_graph.claim_to_test: Rule 219 may exempt listed equipment if conditions are satisfied.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

research_graph.question: Does Rule 222 registration apply instead?
research_graph.claim_to_test: Rule 222 registration may apply to specified equipment categories.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

research_graph.question: Does the facility's potential-to-emit require a federal Title V operating permit?
research_graph.claim_to_test: Major-source potential-to-emit may require a Clean Air Act Title V operating permit.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

research_graph.question: Does SIC/NAICS trigger Industrial General Permit coverage?
research_graph.claim_to_test: SIC/NAICS may trigger California Industrial General Permit coverage.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

research_graph.question: Does construction disturb one or more acres?
research_graph.claim_to_test: Construction disturbance at or above one acre may require construction stormwater permit coverage.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

research_graph.question: Does hazardous material quantity exceed HMBP thresholds?
research_graph.claim_to_test: HMBP applies to all hazardous material storage.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

research_graph.question: Do stored hazardous chemicals exceed EPCRA Tier II reporting thresholds?
research_graph.claim_to_test: EPCRA §311-312 Tier II reporting may apply when a hazardous chemical exceeds its reporting threshold.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

research_graph.question: Does waste generation change hazardous waste generator status?
research_graph.claim_to_test: Spent solvent may affect generator status.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

research_graph.question: Does process wastewater discharge require pretreatment review?
research_graph.claim_to_test: Industrial process wastewater may require pretreatment review.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

research_graph.question: Does a stored highly hazardous chemical meet the OSHA PSM threshold quantity?
research_graph.claim_to_test: OSHA Process Safety Management applies when a listed highly hazardous chemical is at or above its threshold quantity.
success_criteria: quote contains trigger, threshold, exemption, or blocker

report_markdown:
# PermitPilot Applicability Matrix

Facility: Los Angeles County manufacturing facility

Jurisdiction stack: SCAQMD, California Water Boards, Local CUPA

| Requirement | Applies | Status | Confidence |
|---|---:|---|---:|
| SCAQMD Permit to Construct/Operate review | yes | verified | 90% |
| VOC emissions review | yes | verified | 90% |
| SCAQMD Rule 219 exemption check | yes | verified | 90% |
| SCAQMD Rule 222 registration check | yes | verified | 90% |
| H-AIR-TITLEV | needs_review | needs review | 30% |
| California Industrial General Permit applicability | yes | verified | 90% |
| Construction stormwater permit coverage | needs_review | needs review | 55% |
| HMBP/CERS hazardous material reporting | yes | verified | 90% |
| H-HAZMAT-EPCRA | needs_review | needs review | 30% |
| Hazardous waste generator status | needs_review | needs review | 55% |
| Industrial wastewater pretreatment review | needs_review | needs review | 55% |
| H-OSHA-PSM | needs_review | needs review | 30% |

Human review remains required for unverified, missing-fact, or novel determinations.
